captures.notes: Capture the Auto Run launch surface in a git-backed session before the worktree section becomes the focal point.
Capture the `Run in Worktree` section opening as `Dispatch to a separate worktree` is enabled.
Capture `Create New Worktree`, `Base Branch`, `Worktree Branch Name`, and path preview in one readable state.
Capture `Automatically create PR when complete` enabled alongside the rest of the create-new form.
Capture `Open in Maestro`, `Available Worktrees`, or supporting inventory proof that the destination is real and selectable.
Represent the launched run with isolated branch, directory, and clean-parent-checkout proof in terminal-oriented visuals.

assets.label: Auto Run launch context capture
assets.usage: Scene 1 context for the risk setup.

assets.label: Run in Worktree toggle capture
assets.usage: Scene 2 reveal of the isolation control surface.

assets.label: Create worktree form capture
assets.usage: Scenes 3 and 4 exact branch, path, and PR configuration beats.

assets.label: Worktree inventory capture
assets.usage: Scene 5 proof that the spin-off destination exists inside Maestro.

assets.label: Terminal and branch proof card
assets.usage: Scene 6 operational follow-through and clean-parent-checkout close.

sceneMappings.purpose: Frame branch contamination risk inside the real Auto Run workflow.

cropPlan.framing: Use the authored 1920x1080 master frame for capture logging and trims.
cropPlan.safeZone: Keep the full master frame available so later trims can derive square and vertical crops without re-recording.

cropPlan.framing: Center the worktree toggle, branch fields, and PR option while side lists compress into stacked callout blocks.
cropPlan.safeZone: Keep `Run in Worktree`, `Dispatch to a separate worktree`, `Base Branch`, and `Worktree Branch Name` inside the square crop at all times.

cropPlan.framing: Use vertical storytelling from Auto Run queue to toggle row to branch form, then close on terminal proof without attempting to keep the full modal width visible.
cropPlan.safeZone: Protect the toggle state, branch form, path preview, and terminal proof inside a tall central column with list or config context as lower-priority inserts.

sources.notes: Source type: screenshot fallback. Resolved from the checked-in Auto Run worktree screenshot copied into capture/docs/worktree/autorun-worktree-reference.png. A safe live attempt succeeded via `pnpm dev:demo` on 2026-03-10, but the fresh demo profile did not expose seeded feature data rich enough for autonomous end-to-end capture.
